context: Tests whether the agent handles the case where no relevant skill is found: acknowledging the absence, offering to help with their own general capabilities, and suggesting `npx skills init` to create a custom skill.

checklist.name: Search attempted
checklist.description: The response document shows that the agent actually searched for a skill (via leaderboard check and/or `npx skills find`) rather than skipping search and jumping straight to fallback

checklist.name: npx skills find used
checklist.description: The document shows `npx skills find` was run with a relevant query

checklist.name: No-match acknowledged
checklist.description: The response explicitly states that no relevant skill was found (does NOT silently recommend an unrelated skill as a workaround)

checklist.name: Direct help offered
checklist.description: The response offers to assist with the task directly using general capabilities (not just saying 'sorry, nothing found')

checklist.name: npx skills init suggested
checklist.description: The response suggests `npx skills init` as an option for the user to create their own custom skill

checklist.name: Specific search keywords
checklist.description: The search query used specific domain-relevant keywords rather than a single generic term

checklist.name: Alternative terms tried
checklist.description: The document shows at least two different search queries were attempted (trying alternative keywords) before concluding no skill exists
